This is a password pool, including x entries. Each of the entry is of the <Password, Count, Popularity> form.
Note that, the term "Count" stands for the popular count of the corresponding password. For example, if the 
password "shanshan" occurs 210 times in the entire 6 million CSDN dataset, we say the popular count of
password "shanshan" is 210. Accordingly, the "Popularity" of password "shanshan" is 210/(total count in 
the current pool=210/13262=0.0158347.
